ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the audio file was uploaded */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio file in seconds */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio file storage location */,
  "format" TEXT /* Audio file format */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth of the audio file */,
  "num_channels" INTEGER /* Number of channels in the audio file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the audio file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mfcc_features" (
  "mfcc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MFCC feature set */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated audio file */,
  "mfcc1" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 1 */,
  "mfcc2" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 2 */,
  "mfcc3" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 3 */,
  "mfcc4" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 4 */,
  "mfcc5" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 5 */,
  "mfcc6" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 6 */,
  "mfcc7" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 7 */,
  "mfcc8" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 8 */,
  "mfcc9" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 9 */,
  "mfcc10" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 10 */,
  "mfcc11" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 11 */,
  "mfcc12" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 12 */,
  "mfcc13" REAL /* MFCC coefficient 13 */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class label for the feature set */,
  "mfcc_delta" REAL /* Delta MFCC values */,
  "mfcc_delta_delta" REAL /* Delta-delta MFCC values */,
  "mfcc_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for MFCC extraction */,
  "mfcc_extraction_method" TEXT /* Method used for MFCC extraction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mfcc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mfcc_features_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being trained */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file used for training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of training completion */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy achieved by the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Training parameters used */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for model training */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the trained model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio event label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "label_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the label */,
  "label_category" TEXT /* Category of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file processed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken on the audio file */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the processing action */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time taken for the processing action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_logs_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training record evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics of the model performance */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics for model evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the model evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training parameter */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session to which the parameter belongs */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the training parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the training parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the training parameter */,
  "parameter_value_type" TEXT /* Data type of the training parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_parameters_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES model_training ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifiers" (
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classifier */,
  "classifier_name" TEXT /* Name of the classifier model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of classifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classifier */,
  "classifier_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the classifier */,
  "classifier_category" TEXT /* Category of the classifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifier_training" (
  "classifier_training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classifier training record */,
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classifier being trained */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training record */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "training_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the classifier training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classifier_training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifier_training_classifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("classifier_id") REFERENCES classifiers ("classifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifier_training_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES model_training ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_category" TEXT /* Category of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
